features.featureTitle: Diagnose and fix the issue causing car listings not to appear on the Home page (featured listings grid) and the Listings browse page. Investigate the backend `getAllListings` query to ensure it correctly returns all stored car listings, verify the frontend `useQueries.ts` hooks are fetching and passing data correctly, and confirm the CarCard and listings grid components are rendering when data is returned. Ensure the pre-populated sample listings are present and visible after the fix.
